targets.rawSql:
SELECT
                                'Week ' || EXTRACT(WEEK FROM work_date)::text as "Week",
                                EXTRACT(WEEK FROM work_date) as week_num,
                                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2023 THEN employee_name END) as "2023",
                                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2024 THEN employee_name END) as "2024",
                                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2025 THEN employee_name END) as "2025",
                                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2026 THEN employee_name END) as "2026"
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'
                            GROUP BY EXTRACT(WEEK FROM work_date)
                            ORDER BY week_num

SELECT
                                'Week ' || EXTRACT(WEEK FROM work_date)::text as "Week",
                                EXTRACT(WEEK FROM work_date) as week_num,
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2023 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2023",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2024 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2024",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2025 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2025",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2026 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2026"
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'
                            GROUP BY EXTRACT(WEEK FROM work_date)
                            ORDER BY week_num

SELECT
                                TO_CHAR(work_date, 'Mon') as "Month",
                                EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date) as month_num,
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2023 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2023",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2024 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2024",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2025 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2025",
                                ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM work_date) = 2026 THEN duration ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) as "2026"
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'
                            GROUP BY TO_CHAR(work_date, 'Mon'), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date)
                            ORDER BY month_num

SELECT SUM(duration) as total
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_name) as total
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'
                                AND employee_name IS NOT NULL
